title: Salar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Salar''' was a fish that was eaten regularly by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]]. It was fast-growing and had a bland taste. It was originally only found on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]], but thanks to [[Aquatic Integrated Systems]] was grown on the Bothan colony of [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]].

==Appearances==
*[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-10-XXF -->''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]'' {{1stm}}
